title: Electronic digital mains Timer Socket Plug-in with LCD Display 12/24 Hour 7 Days
features: Plug in type, with up to 10 operations
Programmable from minutes to a week
description: From the manufacturer Eurosonic About us Eurosonic was founded in 1996 and is part of Mistras Group since July 2011 as Products and Systems, UT Division. With Princeton unit, we are the second UT division of the Group, serving our European Customers. Eurosonic is an engineering and design company specialising in Non-Destructive Testing using ultrasonic methods. We have developed within the company a range of specialised skills and expertise in Ultrasound, Embedded Electronics, acquisition and analysis Software and Mechanical engineering. Moreover our background is completed by Low frequency knowledge and expertise of Mistras Group SA to become a complete UT solution provider.
